release_notes:
Alpha 4.1.4 - 2026-05-13 - Remove "Output format" combobox
from all three module tabs (Pablo).

The dropdown showed "File output 1 — Preliminary Workings" + two
"Coming soon" placeholders that never shipped. The combobox sat
at the top of the OUTPUT OPTIONS panel in each of the three
module tabs (Single / Batch / Enhance), taking 2 rows of
vertical real estate. Pablo: "esta opción tenía originalmente
una idea, pero ahora es inútil. No se usa y ocupa espacio."

Changes in src/gui_app.py:
- Removed the "Output format" label + ttk.Combobox + the
three StringVars (_single_output_var / _batch_output_var /
_enhance_output_var) and their associated combobox refs.
- Removed the _enforce_output_format method that reverted
"Coming soon" selections to the default — pure dead code now.
- No other module read these vars, so the deletion is safe
(verified via repo-wide grep).

Each of the three module tabs is now slightly more compact (the
OUTPUT OPTIONS panel header sits right above the first
checkbox).

Suite: 775 passed, 5 skipped, 0 failures.
